q: Pointing to a man, Rohan said, 'He is the husband of the only daughter of my grandfather.' How is the man related to Rohan?
DESCRIBE: The only daughter of Rohan's grandfather is Rohan's mother. Her husband is Rohan's father.

q: A woman introduces a boy and says, 'He is the son of the daughter of my mother.' How is the boy related to the woman?
DESCRIBE: Daughter of my mother = myself. Son of myself = son.

q: P is the brother of Q. Q is the mother of R. S is the husband of Q. How is P related to R?
DESCRIBE: P is brother of Q, and Q is mother of R. Therefore P is maternal uncle of R.

q: Introducing a woman, Raj said, 'She is the daughter of the only son of my grandfather.' How is the woman related to Raj?
DESCRIBE: The only son of Raj's grandfather is Raj's father. Daughter of Raj's father = Raj's sister.

q: A is the father of B. C is the wife of A. D is the brother of C. How is D related to B?
DESCRIBE: D is brother of B's mother. Hence D is maternal uncle.

q: Pointing towards a lady, Mohan said, 'The son of her only brother is the brother of my wife.' How is the lady related to Mohan?
DESCRIBE: Lady's brother's son is Mohan's wife's brother. Therefore the lady is mother of Mohan's wife.

q: If A + B means A is the father of B, A - B means A is the sister of B, and A × B means A is the husband of B, then which of the following means 'P is the uncle of Q'?
DESCRIBE: R + P means R is father of P. P - Q means P is sister of Q. P becomes sibling of Q's parent, acting as uncle/aunt relation. Here intended relation is uncle.

q: A man said, 'My father's sister's daughter is the sister of the only son of my grandfather.' How is the woman related to the man?
DESCRIBE: Father's sister's daughter = cousin. The only son of grandfather is the man's father. Therefore she is cousin.

q: X is the daughter of Y. Y is the son of Z. W is the wife of Z. How is W related to X?
DESCRIBE: Y is son of Z and W is wife of Z. Therefore W is grandmother of X.

q: Pointing to a photograph, Neha said, 'She is the wife of the grandson of my mother.' How is the woman related to Neha?
DESCRIBE: Grandson of Neha's mother is Neha's son. Wife of son = daughter-in-law.

q: P is Q's brother. R is P's father. S is R's mother. How is S related to Q?
DESCRIBE: S is mother of R and R is father of Q. Therefore S is grandmother of Q.

q: Introducing a man, a woman said, 'His wife is the only daughter of my father.' How is the man related to the woman?
DESCRIBE: Only daughter of my father = myself. Therefore the man is the woman's husband.

q: A is B's mother. C is A's father. D is C's mother. How is D related to B?
DESCRIBE: D is mother of B's grandfather. Hence D is great-grandmother.

q: Pointing to a man, Sita said, 'His mother's father is my maternal grandfather.' How is the man related to Sita?
DESCRIBE: Both share the same maternal grandfather. Therefore they are cousins.

q: R is the sister of S. T is the husband of R. U is the son of T. How is S related to U?
DESCRIBE: S is sibling of U's mother (R). Hence S is uncle of U.

q: A man said, 'The woman I am looking at is the daughter of the only daughter of my grandmother.' How is the woman related to the man?
DESCRIBE: Only daughter of grandmother = man's mother. Daughter of his mother = sister.

q: If P is the father of Q, Q is the sister of R, and R is the mother of S, then how is P related to S?
DESCRIBE: P is father of R. R is mother of S. Therefore P is grandfather of S.

q: Pointing to a woman, Karan said, 'She is the sister of the son of my grandfather.' How is the woman related to Karan?
DESCRIBE: Son of Karan's grandfather is Karan's father. Father's sister = Karan's aunt.

q: A is married to B. B is the daughter of C. D is the son of A. How is C related to D?
DESCRIBE: C is parent of B, and B is parent of D. Hence C is grandparent of D.

q: Pointing towards a boy, Anu said, 'He is the son of the daughter of my father's mother.' How is the boy related to Anu?
DESCRIBE: Father's mother = grandmother. Daughter of grandmother = Anu's aunt. Son of aunt = cousin.
